name: Amun
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Amun embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Odin
related.teaser: Odin embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Zeus
related.teaser: Zeus embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Janus
related.teaser: Janus embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Indra
related.teaser: Indra embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Perkūnas
related.teaser: Perkūnas embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Perun
related.teaser: Perun embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Raijin
related.teaser: Raijin embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Thor
related.teaser: Thor embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Mokosh
related.teaser: Mokosh embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.
